'''âv-ng-g-k''' ('''kavanggekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waif|waif]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ng-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waif|waif]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-ng-g-k
|-
! Lemma
| kavanggekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivanggekoko|thivanggekoko]] || [[word:jivanggekoko|jivanggekoko]] || [[word:shivanggekoko|shivanggekoko]] || [[word:kivanggekoko|kivanggekoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
